description: Pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering, focusing on software development, algorithms, and data structures. Engaged in various projects and coursework to build a strong foundation in software engineering principles and practices.

Tutor in Math, Physics, and Programming. Supported students in improving knowledge and enhancing academic performance resulting in a 2 - 5 points increase in test scores. Developed effective communication, time management, and problem-solving skills.

Led and organized various student events and activities, coordinating with teams to ensure successful execution. Developed leadership and organizational skills while fostering a vibrant campus community.
